_description: Test payloads for all ESignPay API POST/PUT endpoints. UUIDs and tokens reference seed data from TestDataInitializer.

POST /api/documents.description: Create a new document with signers

payload.title: Contrat de bail - Appartement Paris 15e
payload.description: Contrat de location meublée entre bailleur et locataire

POST /api/documents/{id}/send.description: Send a document for signature (no body required)
POST /api/documents/{id}/send.note: Use the ID of a DRAFT document from seed data

POST /api/documents/{id}/resend.description: Resend signing request to pending signers (no body required)
POST /api/documents/{id}/resend.note: Use the ID of a PENDING_SIGNATURE document from seed data

POST /api/documents/{id}/live-sign/{sign.description: Sign a document in-person (owner signs on behalf of present signer)
POST /api/documents/{id}/live-sign/{sign.note: Use document ID and signer ID from the PENDING_SIGNATURE document

POST /api/sign/{token}.description: Submit a signature for a document (public endpoint, requires OTP verified)
POST /api/sign/{token}.note: Use token 'test-token-signer-1' or 'test-token-signer-2' from seed data. OTP must be verified first.

POST /api/sign/{token}/send-otp.description: Send OTP code via SMS (public endpoint)

POST /api/sign/{token}/verify-otp.note: Use token 'test-token-signer-1' from seed data. OTP code must match what was generated.

POST /api/payments.description: Create a new Stripe payment (requires Stripe API)

POST /api/payments/confirm.note: Use the stripePaymentIntentId from the PENDING payment in seed data

POST /api/payments/{id}/cancel.description: Cancel a pending payment (no body required)
POST /api/payments/{id}/cancel.note: Use the ID of the PENDING payment from seed data

PUT /api/account-applications/{id}.description: Update an existing account application (DRAFT only)
PUT /api/account-applications/{id}.note: Use the ID of the DRAFT application from seed data

POST /api/account-applications/{id}/subm.description: Submit an application for review (no body required)
POST /api/account-applications/{id}/subm.note: Application must have required KYC docs (ID + proof of address) and all mandatory fields

POST /api/account-applications/{id}/kyc.note: Valid documentType values: ID_CARD, PASSPORT, PROOF_OF_ADDRESS, INCOME_PROOF

POST /api/account-applications/{id}/gene.description: Generate contract PDF (requires KYC_VERIFIED status or auto-verifies from KYC_PENDING)
POST /api/account-applications/{id}/gene.note: Application must have KYC documents verified

POST /api/account-applications/{id}/rege.note: Deletes old contract and creates a new one with fresh signing tokens

POST /api/webhooks/stripe.description: Stripe webhook endpoint (public, requires valid Stripe-Signature header)
POST /api/webhooks/stripe.note: Requires Stripe-Signature header — cannot be tested without Stripe's signing key

GET /api/auth/me.expectedData: Returns the test user (Test User, test@esignpay.com)

GET /api/documents.description: List all documents owned by current user

GET /api/documents/{id}.description: Get a specific document by ID

GET /api/payments.description: List all payments for current user

GET /api/payments/{id}.description: Get a specific payment by ID

GET /api/account-applications.description: List all applications for current user

GET /api/account-applications/{id}.description: Get a specific application by ID
GET /api/account-applications/{id}.expectedData: Returns application with KYC documents and status history
